testcase.name: SEC_005 Night
testcase.failure:
Step: Click Night, the touchpad enters night mode and broadcasts the voice prompt "night".
Action: Arm Night
Page: main
Message: Arm night action failed, status: Disarmed
testcase.system-out:
================================================== Step: Check whether the Arm Status is Disarmed
Action: Check Status
Page: main
Result: PASS
Duration: 2334 ms
Message: Status check passed. Expected and actual status: Disarmed

testcase.name: SEC_006 Armed Night Disarm
testcase.failure:
Step: Check whether the Arm Status is Armed Night
Action: Check Status
Page: main
Message: Status check failed. Expected: Armed Night, Actual: Disarmed

testcase.name: SEC_007 Entry Delay On
testcase.failure:
Step: Close Sensor
Action: Close
Page: sensor
Message: Failed to close sensor 'zone 1': app is not running.
